network: Namma Metro / Bengaluru Metro Rail Corporation Limited
source: BMRCL via IUDX (India Urban Data Exchange)
notes: IUDX developer registration required. Data is used by Namma Yatri and Tummoc apps — strong signal of quality. Deferred until IUDX registration is completed.

iudxRegistration.notes: Register as a developer, search 'BMRCL' in the catalog, request access to the GTFS Static feed.
